title: Progressive web apps
body: When will Firefox desktop browsers start getting the Progressive Web Apps to be installed on Desktops? Please help. Hello Use web apps in Firefox for Window. https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/web-apps-firefox-windows Frequently asked questions. Otherwise. Please check. 1 - Go to Configuration Editor for Firefox https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/about-config-editor-firefox 2- Enter a search term browser.taskbarTabs.enabled You can double-click on the preference to set the value to true
